allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\klins\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-klins-Documents-github-sdd-nonggof-fastapi-v1\\e0361fe0-2b02-4331-a6a2-c56f5babacf7\\tool-results\\bd13ljz0e.txt"; $chunks = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^data: \\{"type": "ai_chunk"' }; Write-Output "Total ai_chunk events: $\($chunks.Count\)"; $full = ""; foreach \($l in $chunks\) { $j = $l.Substring\(6\) | ConvertFrom-Json; $full += $j.content }; Write-Output "---FULL RECONSTRUCTED MESSAGE---"; Write-Output $full; Write-Output "---STREAM END EVENTS---"; $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match 'stream_end|end_of_ai|error' } | Select-Object -Last 5)
